descFull: 📱 Real-time mobile monitor & remote control for Antigravity AI sessions. Mirrors your desktop chat to your phone via Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) with sub-100ms snapshots, secure global tunnel access (ngrok/Cloudflare/Pinggy), HTTPS, and full remote control.
